title: Deselect all
excerpt: Is there a keyboard shortcut to deselect all on the main table view? I keep finding myself accidentally updating multiple entries. I can select all with ctrl A but I’m not finding the equivalent to that to easily deselec…

posts.author: akemikitty (Rebecca Bowen)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a keyboard shortcut to deselect all on the main table view? I keep finding myself accidentally updating multiple entries. I can select all with ctrl A but I’m not finding the equivalent to that to easily deselect everything that is currently selected. Thanks!

posts.author: akemikitty (Rebecca Bowen)
posts.cookedHtml: OK, duh, answered my own question - if you close the bar that pops up telling you how many items you have selected & gives you options for acting on them, that action deselects them.
